title: Initialize an AGV From the Tote Side Popup
summary: Use the tote-side popup to initialize an AGV and specify the associated station ID when supported by the interface. The source confirms that AGV initialization is available from a tote-side popup and that station ID can be identified in RMS when selecting a cell, but it does not provide exact field names, button labels, or detailed confirmation behavior.
when_to_use: Use when support personnel need to initialize an AGV from the tote side using the popup interface and need to provide or verify a station ID as part of that workflow.
not_for: Do not use when the required AGV or station ID controls are not available in the popup.
Do not use when the correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.
Do not use as a detailed error-handling procedure; the source does not provide confirmation messages or recovery steps.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the tote-side popup, identify the AGV or tote-side item, enter or verify station ID information, and confirm the initialization action.

safety_notes: The source is a brief training mention and does not define full operator safety or permission boundaries for this action.
Do not assume additional controls, confirmations, or recovery actions beyond what is shown in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the tote side interface
RMS access to view station ID when selecting a cell

access_required: Access to the tote side interface
system_preconditions: The tote-side popup for AGV initialization is available in the interface.
A station ID can be identified if required by the workflow.
external_references: RMS station/cell view for station ID lookup

visual_references.description: Training video frame associated with the tote-side popup discussion and nearby transcript describing AGV initialization and station ID reference.

steps.title: Open the tote-side AGV initialization popup
steps.purpose: Access the interface used to initialize an AGV from the tote side.
steps.instruction: Go to the tote side interface and open the popup used to initialize an AGV.
steps.expected_result: The AGV initialization popup is open and available for input.
steps.healthy_condition: A tote-side popup for AGV initialization is visible.
steps.failure_condition: The popup cannot be found or opened from the tote side interface.

actions.label: Open initialization popup
actions.exact_action: Go to the tote side interface and open the AGV initialization popup.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference frame associated with the training explanation that AGV initialization is performed from a tote-side popup.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the tote side, you can initialize an AGV. This is a pop up.

steps.title: Identify the AGV or tote-side item in the popup
steps.purpose: Ensure the initialization action is applied to the intended AGV or tote-side item.
steps.instruction: Identify the AGV or tote-side item to initialize using the controls available in the popup.
steps.expected_result: The intended AGV or tote-side item is selected or identified in the popup.
steps.healthy_condition: The popup shows the intended AGV or tote-side target for initialization.
steps.failure_condition: The correct AGV or tote-side item cannot be identified from the popup controls.

actions.label: Identify AGV target
actions.exact_action: Identify the AGV or tote-side item to initialize using the popup controls available in the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the tote-side training reference to orient to the popup workflow; exact field names are not shown in the source.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the tote side, you can initialize an AGV. This is a pop up.

steps.title: Enter or select the station ID
steps.purpose: Provide the station reference when the popup requires station information as part of initialization.
steps.instruction: Enter or select the station ID when the popup requires a destination or station reference.
steps.expected_result: A station ID is populated in the popup when required by the workflow.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended station ID is available and entered or selected in the popup.
steps.failure_condition: The station ID is required but cannot be entered, selected, or confirmed.

actions.label: Provide station ID
actions.exact_action: Enter or select the station ID when the popup requires a destination or station reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.
Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can specify what station ID it is... in RMS, when you pick a cell, you could see the station ID.

steps.title: Verify the station ID in RMS if needed
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct station ID using RMS when the workflow depends on cell-based station identification.
steps.instruction: Use the station ID shown in RMS when selecting a cell, if that is how the station ID is being verified in this workflow.
steps.expected_result: The station ID used for initialization matches the station ID shown in RMS.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS shows a station ID for the selected cell and it matches the intended reference.
steps.failure_condition: RMS does not show a usable station ID or the correct station ID cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Check station ID in RMS
actions.exact_action: Use the station ID shown in RMS when selecting a cell, if that is how the station ID is being verified in this workflow.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can specify what station ID it is... in RMS, when you pick a cell, you could see the station ID.

steps.title: Confirm initialization and verify interface response
steps.purpose: Submit the initialization request and verify that the interface indicates the AGV has been initialized.
steps.instruction: Confirm the initialization action in the popup and verify that the AGV has been initialized according to the interface response.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is initialized from the tote side with the intended station ID reference entered through the popup.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface indicates the initialization action completed successfully.
steps.failure_condition: The interface does not indicate successful initialization, or the source-provided workflow does not expose a clear confirmation.

actions.label: Confirm initialization
actions.exact_action: Confirm the initialization action in the popup and verify that the AGV has been initialized according to the interface response.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General tote-side API/training reference associated with the initialization discussion; the source does not show exact confirmation text for AGV initialization.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.
Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.
Escalate if the interface does not provide a clear success indication or if initialization cannot be verified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: On the tote side, you can initialize an AGV. This is a pop up.
You can specify what station ID it is... in RMS, when you pick a cell, you could see the station ID.

success_criteria: The tote-side popup is accessible for AGV initialization.
The intended AGV or tote-side item is identified in the popup.
The required station ID is entered or selected when applicable.
The station ID is confirmed from RMS when needed.
The interface indicates the AGV has been initialized.
healthy_conditions: A tote-side popup exists for AGV initialization.
The required AGV and station ID controls are available in the interface.
RMS shows the station ID when selecting the relevant cell.
The interface response indicates successful initialization.
failure_conditions: The popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.
The correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.
The source does not provide detailed confirmation messages or error handling steps.
Initialization cannot be verified from the interface response.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the popup does not provide the needed AGV or station ID controls.
Escalate if the correct station ID cannot be confirmed from RMS.
Escalate if the interface does not provide enough information to verify successful initialization.
Escalate for SME review because the source is a brief training mention and does not define exact fields, buttons, or error handling.
